creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
You have to visit @alseefdubai this DSF! The vibrant old souq dazzles with light installations and live performances. Visit the local shops, taste authentic cuisine, and see the historic Dubai Creek. 

It’s definitely a good place to unwind and immerse into local culture! 

🗓️ DSF Market at Al Seef is until January 29, 2023. Plan your visit now! Tag your family and friends! 

@alseefdubai @celebratedubai @styledbydubai 
#mydsf #visitDubai

transcription.text: Thanks for watching and don't forget to like and subscribe!
